text: Hello, I'm experiencing some really frustrating issues with the app. It just won't load any of my data, and I've tried everything, like restarting my device and reinstalling the app. I think there might be a problem but I'm not sure what else to do. Can you please help?
I'm really frustrated! My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. Please help!
my account... I can't log in, password reset link not working. help?
I'm really upset! My app keeps crashing and I can't even log in. It was working fine yesterday, what’s happening?!

I really need some help understanding the features of your service. It feels like I'm missing out on something important, but I'm not sure what questions to ask. Can you clarify what sets your plans apart?
Could you please provide clarification on the specific processes involved in your subscription management system?

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction regarding my recent order. While I expected timely delivery, it appears there has been a significant delay, and I am left without any update on the status of my package. I would appreciate assistance in resolving this matter.
I canceled my sub but it still charged me. Can I get a refnd?
I seem to have encountered an unusual problem with my account that I cannot quite detail. It appears some settings are not following my preferences. Could you assist?

I am really frustrated because I ordered a special gift for my sister's birthday last week. It said it would arrive on Thursday, and now it’s the following Thursday and I still don’t have it! Can you please tell me what’s going on? This is really disappointing since I wanted it to be a surprise for her big day, and now I'm left with nothing to give her. Please help!
hey, I was charged but I didn’t want that plan, can u help? like, I need it back?
I thought I could get support on weekends, but I don't see any help available now. Can you confirm if that's true or not?
My app crashes when I try to log in, but other times it works fine. What's wrong?
I can't log into my account. It says my password is wrong, but I didn't change it.

I'm not sure if I'm having trouble with my account or if maybe I just forgot my password, but I really need to access it! It seems like every time I try to log in, the system says my credentials are incorrect. However, I could have sworn I changed my password last week, but then again, maybe I didn’t? It’s all kind of confusing, honestly. Can you help me figure out what’s going on?
I am unable to access my account, but I also seem to be logged in on another device. Can you please clarify if there are any issues with my account that I should be aware of?
